allow:
Bash(cat > /mnt/d/meeting_intelligence/.env << 'EOF'
# AI Meeting Assistant - Environment Configuration
# 在这里填写你的 API Key，每次运行会自动加载

# Zhipu AI \(GLM\) API Key
# 获取地址: https://open.bigmodel.cn/usercenter/apikeys
ZHIPU_API_KEY=你的智谱API密钥

# OpenAI API Key \(可选\)
# 获取地址: https://platform.openai.com/api-keys
# OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-xxx

# Anthropic API Key \(可选\)
# 获取地址: https://console.anthropic.com/
# ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-xxx

# Default LLM provider: openai, anthropic, or glm
DEFAULT_LLM_PROVIDER=glm

# Default model
DEFAULT_LLM_MODEL=glm-4-flash
EOF
echo "✓ 已创建 .env 文件")
Bash(ps -fp 47526 && kill 47526 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; ps -fp 47526 2>/dev/null || echo "进程已终止")
Bash(curl -s "https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/rate_limit" -H "Authorization: Bearer $ZHIPU_API_KEY" 2>/dev/null || echo "无法查询配额状态")

Bash(cat > /mnt/d/projects/Meeting_intelligence/tests/test_mapper/__init__.py << 'EOF'
# Tests for mapper module
EOF)

Bash(git add docs/progress/2026-03-02-mvp-completion-progress.md openspec/changes/2026-02-25-mvp-completion/tasks.md
git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
docs: 添加项目进度报告 \(2026-03-02\)

## 新增文档
- docs/progress/2026-03-02-mvp-completion-progress.md
  - 执行摘要
  - MVP Completion 进度
  - CLI 命令参考
  - 下一步工作

## 更新
- openspec/changes/2026-02-25-mvp-completion/tasks.md
  - 标记 Iteration 0, 1, 4 完成
  - 更新 MVP Checklist

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(echo "=== Outputs Summary ===" && echo "" && \\
for f in /mnt/d/projects/Meeting_intelligence/outputs/*; do
  echo "File: $\(basename $f\)"
  echo "Size: $\(stat -c%s "$f"\) bytes"
  echo "Date: $\(stat -c%y "$f"\)"
  echo ""
done)

Bash(echo "=== Outputs Summary ===" && echo "" && \\
ls -la /mnt/d/projects/Meeting_intelligence/outputs/ && echo "" && \\
echo "=== File Details ===" && \\
for f in /mnt/d/projects/Meeting_intelligence/outputs/*; do
  echo "File: $\(basename $f\)"
  echo "Size: $\(stat -c%s "$f"\) bytes"
  echo "Date: $\(stat -c%y "$f"\)"
  echo ""
done)

Bash(sed -i '618,621s/"模板名称不能为空！",//' /mnt/d/projects/Meeting_intelligence/meeting_intelligence/cli.py && sed -i '630,633s/"模板描述不能为空！",//' /mnt/d/projects/Meeting_intelligence/meeting_intelligence/cli.py && echo "参数修正完成")

Bash(sed -i "s/_get_input_with_retry/_get_clean_input/g" /mnt/d/projects/Meeting_intelligence/tests/test_cli.py && sed -i "/assert 'error_msg' in sig.parameters/d" /mnt/d/projects/Meeting_intelligence/tests/test_cli.py && echo "测试文件更新完成")

Bash(cat > /tmp/fix_patch.txt << 'EOF'
        if edit_choice in \(2, 3\):
            # 修改描述
            print\(f"\\n当前描述: {selected_template.description}"\)
            new_description = self._get_clean_input\(
                "请输入新描述: ",
                allow_empty=False
            \)

        # 执行更新
EOF
sed -i '628,632d' /mnt/d/projects/Meeting_intelligence/meeting_intelligence/cli.py
sed -i '627r /tmp/fix_patch.txt' /mnt/d/projects/Meeting_intelligence/meeting_intelligence/cli.py
echo "代码已修复")
Bash(ls -la /mnt/d/projects/Meeting_intelligence/data/outputs/meeting_01_*总结.txt 2>/dev/null || echo "总结文件已生成")

Bash(curl -s https://api.deepseek.com/models \\

  | python -m json.tool 2>/dev/null | head -50)
Bash(find /mnt/d/projects/Meeting_intelligence -name "*.pyc" -delete && find /mnt/d/projects/Meeting_intelligence -name "__pycache__" -type d -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; echo "缓存已清除")
Bash(find /mnt/d/projects/Meeting_intelligence -name "*.pyc" -delete && find /mnt/d/projects/Meeting_intelligence -name "__pycache__" -type d -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; echo "✓ Python 缓存已清除")
